title: Youtube Poop: The last stand against WeeGee Part 3
description:
I hope you saw Part 2 and Part 1 with my video called Youtube Poop: Gay Luigi Snaps before watching Part 3 so you don't get lost at some point in the video.

Youtube Poop: The last stand against WeeGee Final Part Enjoy!

I made an alternative ending for the Battle with Malleo and WeeGee, check out the video respose for this video or just go on my channel, and find it if you want.

"SONG LIST"

1: Eternal Sonata -  I bet my belief.
2: Paper Mario - Star Spirit's Theme 
3: The Omen Soundtrack: - Ave Satani (Main Theme)
4: Gears of War 2 - Locust Temple
5: A music from DBZ i don't remember the name sadly.
6: Final Fantasy 7 - One Winged Angel Orchestra Version
7: Another music from DBZ i don't remember the name.
8: Final Fantasy 3 - The Decisive Battle
9: Tales of Vesperia - A Once-in-a-Lifetime Due
10: Final Fantasy 3  Celes theme.
11: Legend of Zelda Majora Mask - Staff Roll.

"END OF THE SONG LIST"

Know the game MyBrute? It can be a fun little game where you make a character and have him fight in a arena VS other people character it is free and very simple to play with.

I'm looking for pupils! Yes, if you are interested in becoming my pupils on Mybrute well just go on this link make a character and start to fight in the arena. ^^

Here the link

http://dontmoveanddiiie.mybrute.com
